title: Slack and Discord Integration
description: Request to integrate Slack and Discord platforms to enable seamless communication and collaboration between the two services.
business_case_summary:
Business Case Summary: Slack and Discord Integration (DEM-2026-0106)

Executive Summary  
This project aims to integrate Slack and Discord platforms to streamline communication and enhance collaboration across teams. The integration will bridge current communication gaps, increasing efficiency and responsiveness.

Business Value  
By enabling seamless interaction between Slack and Discord users, the integration supports faster decision-making and improves customer digital engagement. It will reduce duplicated efforts and foster a unified communication environment.

Risk Mitigation  
To address the medium risk level, the project will implement rigorous testing and phased rollout to ensure stability. Continuous monitoring and user feedback will guide adjustments, minimizing disruption and security concerns.
